Book Eye Test

Premium Lenses

The world's finest lens technology, crafted to your eyes.

Authorized partners of Essilor, Hoya and Zeiss — we stock the lens designs that the world's most demanding wearers rely on, and we know how to fit them.

Book consultation

Lens categories

A lens for every life you lead.

Essilor · Hoya · Zeiss

Progressive lenses

Seamless near, intermediate and far vision in one lens. Premium designs by Varilux, Hoyalux & Zeiss Precision.

For screens 8+ hrs/day

Blue-cut lenses

Cut harmful blue light from screens, reduce digital eye strain and sleep better. Essential for IT professionals.

Anti-fatigue

Computer glasses

Specially calibrated for arm-length distances. Blue-cut + anti-fatigue + anti-glare in one.

Crizal · Hoya Hi-Vision

Anti-glare coating

Eliminates reflections from oncoming headlights and screens. Essential for night driving and presentations.

UV400 certified

UV protection

Full 400nm UV-A/UV-B protection — built into the lens, not just the tint. Protects retinal health long-term.

Ultra-thin

High-index lenses

Thinner, lighter lenses for stronger prescriptions. 1.67 and 1.74 index for the most discerning eyes.

Light-adaptive

Photochromic lenses

Lenses that darken automatically in sunlight and clear up indoors. Transitions® and Sensity® available.

For sunlight

Polarized lenses

Eliminate glare from water, snow and roads. The gold standard for driving and outdoor sport.

Partner brands

Three legendary houses, one boutique.

Essilor

Inventors of the progressive lens. Varilux®, Crizal® and Eyezen® for every prescription.

Hoya

Japanese precision optics with Hoyalux® progressives and Hi-Vision® coatings.

Zeiss

German engineering, century-old optical heritage. Precision® and DriveSafe® lenses.

Begin the journey

Book your eye test
today.

Walk into our Hadapsar boutique for a complimentary consultation. We'll measure, advise and craft the perfect pair — together.

Eylux Eye Care

A boutique optical experience in Hadapsar, Pune — pairing meticulous eye care with the world's finest eyewear houses.
